body:
Based on 2026 local reviews, **_BMS Garage Doors and Gates_** is a top-rated option with a 4.9-star rating from 170 reviews on [Yelp](https://m.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Garage+Door+Repair&find_loc=San+Ramon%2C+CA). Another highly-rated, local option is [Precision Garage Door of East Bay](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/san-ramon), which has over 129 reviews, averaging 4.78 stars.   * **_Generational Garage Doors_** (Highly rated on Google): Mentioned for efficient installations by technicians like Dustin.
  * **R & P Garage Doors** (Diamond Certified): Noted for consistent, reliable, and reasonably priced service.
